params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Nest. Focus tightly on: sofa, coffee table, area rug, shared: low-profile 3-seater sofa — pale oat linen upholstery (#EDE6DE), solid light oak recessed base, low back, shared: layered neutral flatweave rug — natural wool & jute blend, off-white ground (#EDE6DE) with subtle oatmeal border (#D2BFA3), low pile, shared: organic-shaped low coffee table — medium walnut veneer, elliptical form, matte lacquer, medium potted ficus lyrata in matte terracotta pot (#8A6E52), shared: low-profile 3-seater sofa — pale oat linen upholstery (#EDE6DE), light oak recessed base, low back, one medium potted ficus lyrata in matte terracotta pot (#8A6E52), 2–3 dark ceramic vessels (small) on coffee table, bookshelf. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, warm Japandi interior tuned for a young family: low-profile furniture, warm neutrals, tactile natural materials, and a small dedicated work corner. Prioritize organic shapes, layered natural textures, and biophilic accents while keeping sightlines uncluttered for an open-plan flow between living, dining, and kitchen. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
